info.description: Customer requests to be notified when a specific OOS product is restocked (#102). Created from the storefront PDP capture form; processed by the restock trigger when inventory crosses zero.

MedusaProductId.description: Medusa `prod_…` id of the requested product.

ProductHandle.description: Storefront URL handle (used to build the restock email's product link).

ProductTitle.description: Snapshot of the product title at the time of request (so the restock email can show the name the customer originally saw).

NotifiedAt.description: Timestamp the restock email was sent. Null until the trigger fires.

UnsubscribedAt.description: Set when the customer clicks the unsubscribe link in the confirm email — restock trigger skips them.

UnsubscribeToken.description: Random, single-use token used to authenticate the unsubscribe link without exposing the request id.

Source.description: Which storefront surface created the request — useful for funnel attribution.
